The '''Scatter''' was a shallow valley on [[Iego/Legends|Iego]] where [[Diathim/Legends|Angels]] crashed all [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. It was filled with the wreckage of spacecrafts, and even some workable parts. However, the castaways living on the planet's surface, due to their tribal conflicts, were unable to come together to fix a ship and escape.<ref name="GatORW" />

Most shipwrecked spacers chose to live near the Scatter. Those castaways not belonging to any tribe, often insane and dangerous, lived closest to the junkyard.<ref name="GatORW" />

Those tribes that lived around the Scatter included (in clockwise order) the [[Alkasaners Tribe]], [[Anno Tribe]], [[Clicksticks Tribe]], [[Demon Stickers Tribe]], [[Blue Bantha Tribe]], [[Whyrens Tribe]], [[To Endure Tribe]], [[Greelcane Tribe]], and the [[Brightrods Tribe]].<ref name="GatORW" />
